Strting query: Please create an agentic workflow json template that can solve this task:
user query: Fetch xView1 images from Athens International Airport, Greece. Consider a wide area. Then run the Swin-L detector and finally please zoom the map there!
task description: Appropriately break down the task and assign relevant realistic agent definitions including tools and a smart workflow coordination of these agents.

description: Agentic workflow to identify geographical bounds, fetch xView1 images, run the Swin-L detector, and visualize the area around Athens International Airport.
label: Athens International Airport Workflow

participants.description: Identifies and defines the geographical bounds for the wide area around Athens International Airport for image fetching.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: geo_bounds_agent
config.description: Defines geographical bounds for image fetching.
config.system_message: Define the geographical bounds for the image fetching.

participants.description: Fetches xView1 images based on the geographical bounds defined around Athens International Airport.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: data_acquisition_agent
config.description: Fetches xView1 images based on specified geographical bounds.
config.system_message: Fetch images based on geographical bounds.

participants.description: Runs the Swin-L detector on fetched xView1 images to identify objects and generate a detailed report.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: detection_agent
config.description: Identifies objects in the fetched xView1 images using the Swin-L detector.
config.system_message: Run the Swin-L detector on the fetched images to generate a report.

participants.description: Zooms the map around Athens International Airport to visualize the area where images were fetched.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: map_agent
config.description: Visualizes the fetched xView1 images on a mapping platform.
config.system_message: Zoom the map around the specified bounds to visualize the image coverage.
